languages.text: "Нет, примитивное создание". {n}Оружие некрона совершает резкий взмах, но не в вашу сторону. Оно нацеливается на гвардейцев.{/n} "Твое существование будет прекращено". {n}Навершие посоха вспыхивает, и каскад зеленоватых искр пробегает по телам плененных бойцов, подчиняя их волю жестокому разуму ксеноса.{/n}

"You will go no further, primitive creature." {n}The Necron's weapon swings sharply, but not in your direction. It is aimed at the Guardsmen.{/n} "Your existence ends here." {n}The tip of the staff flashes, and a cascade of green sparks passes over the bodies of the captive fighters, bending them to the xenos's malevolent will.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Нет, примитивное создание". {n}Оружие некрона совершает резкий взмах, но не в вашу сторону. Оно нацеливается на гвардейцев.{/n} "Твое существование будет прекращено". {n}Навершие посоха вспыхивает, и каскад зеленоватых искр пробегает по телам плененных бойцов, подчиняя их волю жестокому разуму ксеноса.{/n}

"You will go no further, primitive creature." {n}The Necron's weapon swings sharply, but not in your direction. It is aimed at the Guardsmen.{/n} "Your existence ends here." {n}The tip of the staff flashes, and a cascade of green sparks passes over the bodies of the captive fighters, bending them to the xenos's malevolent will.{/n}

"Such discourtesy is unacceptable for a visitor, human." {n}The Necron's weapon swings sharply, but not in your direction. It is aimed at the Guardsmen.{/n} "Your existence ends here." {n}The tip of the staff flashes, and a cascade of green sparks passes over the bodies of the captive fighters.{/n}

languages.text: 「愚かな人間どもは、救いようのないほど愚かだ」{n}ネクロンの武器が鋭く振るわれたが、あなたのほうに向けられたわけではなかった。それは、ガードマンに向けられていた。{/n}「このような傲慢な訪問者を、すぐに主へと報告するが、今は…彼らの唯一の敵は、侵入者であるあなただ」
languages.original_text: "You human creatures are hopelessly stupid." {n}The Necron's weapon swings sharply, but not in your direction. It is aimed at the Guardsmen.{/n} "I will report such an outrageously insolent visitor to the overlord without delay, but for now... Their only enemy will be you, trespasser."

traits.locale_text: 「愚かな人間どもは、救いようのないほど愚かだ」{n}ネクロンの武器が鋭く振るわれたが、あなたのほうに向けられたわけではなかった。それは、ガードマンに向けられていた。{n}「このような傲慢な訪問者を、すぐに主へと報告するが、今は…彼らの唯一の敵は、侵入者であるあなただ」

languages.text: «No darás un paso más, primitiv{mf|o|a}». {n}El arma del Necrón se mueve bruscamente, pero no hacia ti. Apunta a los guardias.{/n} «Tu existencia termina aquí». {n}La punta del bastón destella y una lluvia de chispas verdes recorre los cuerpos de los guerreros cautivos, sometiéndolos a la perversa voluntad del xenos.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You will go no further, primitive creature." {n}The Necron's weapon swings sharply, but not in your direction. It is aimed at the Guardsmen.{/n} "Your existence ends here." {n}The tip of the staff flashes, and a cascade of green sparks passes over the bodies of the captive fighters, bending them to the xenos's malevolent will.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No darás un paso más, primitiv{mf|o|a}». {n}El arma del Necrón se mueve bruscamente, pero no hacia ti. Apunta a los guardias.{/n} «Tu existencia termina aquí». {n}La punta del bastón destella y una lluvia de chispas verdes recorre los cuerpos de los guerreros cautivos, sometiéndolos a la perversa voluntad del xenos.{/n}

languages.text: “你不能再往前走了，原始生物。”{n}那太空死灵的武器猛地一挥，却并未指向你，而是对准了那些卫兵。{/n}“你们的生命，就此终结。”{n}权杖顶端一闪，一串绿色的火星便如瀑布般倾泻在被俘战士们的身上，将他们强行拖入异形的邪恶意志之下。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You will go no further, primitive creature." {n}The Necron's weapon swings sharply, but not in your direction. It is aimed at the Guardsmen.{/n} "Your existence ends here." {n}The tip of the staff flashes, and a cascade of green sparks passes over the bodies of the captive fighters, bending them to the xenos's malevolent will.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “你不能再往前走了，原始生物。”{n}那太空死灵的武器猛地一挥，却并未指向你，而是对准了那些卫兵。{/n}“你们的生命，就此终结。”{n}权杖顶端一闪，一串绿色的火星便如瀑布般倾泻在被俘战士们的身上，将他们强行拖入异形的邪恶意志之下。{/n}

languages.text: "Keinen Schritt weiter, primitive Kreatur." {n}Der Necron schwingt seine Waffe, allerdings nicht in deine Richtung. Sein Ziel sind die Gardisten.{/n} "Eure Existenz endet hier." {n}Die Spitze des Stabes blitzt auf und eine Kaskade grüner Funken ergießt sich über die Leiber der gefangenen Kämpfer und unterwirft sie dem Willen des Xenos.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You will go no further, primitive creature." {n}The Necron's weapon swings sharply, but not in your direction. It is aimed at the Guardsmen.{/n} "Your existence ends here." {n}The tip of the staff flashes, and a cascade of green sparks passes over the bodies of the captive fighters, bending them to the xenos's malevolent will.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Keinen Schritt weiter, primitive Kreatur." {n}Der Necron schwingt seine Waffe, allerdings nicht in deine Richtung. Sein Ziel sind die Gardisten.{/n} "Eure Existenz endet hier." {n}Die Spitze des Stabes blitzt auf und eine Kaskade grüner Funken ergießt sich über die Leiber der gefangenen Kämpfer und unterwirft sie dem Willen des Xenos.{/n}

languages.text: "Daha fazla ilerleyemezsin ilkel yaratık." {n}Nekron'un silahı sertçe savruluyor ama sana doğru değil, Muhafızlara nişan alıyor.{/n} "Varlığın burada sona eriyor." {n}Asanın ucu parlıyor ve bir dizi yeşil kıvılcım, esir savaşçıların bedenlerinin üzerinden geçerek zenonun kötü niyetli iradesine boyun eğdiriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You will go no further, primitive creature." {n}The Necron's weapon swings sharply, but not in your direction. It is aimed at the Guardsmen.{/n} "Your existence ends here." {n}The tip of the staff flashes, and a cascade of green sparks passes over the bodies of the captive fighters, bending them to the xenos's malevolent will.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Daha fazla ilerleyemezsin ilkel yaratık." {n}Nekron'un silahı sertçe savruluyor ama sana doğru değil, Muhafızlara nişan alıyor.{/n} "Varlığın burada sona eriyor." {n}Asanın ucu parlıyor ve bir dizi yeşil kıvılcım, esir savaşçıların bedenlerinin üzerinden geçerek zenonun kötü niyetli iradesine boyun eğdiriyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Vous n'irez pas plus loin, créature primitive. » {n}L'arme du Nécron se balance brusquement, mais pas dans votre direction. Elle est braquée sur les gardes.{/n} « Votre existence s'achève ici. » {n}La pointe du bâton s'illumine et une cascade d'étincelles vertes déferle sur les corps des combattants captifs, les soumettant à la volonté malveillante du xénos.{/n}
